examples.title: Velocity Components
examples.content: An arrow fired at 30° angle with 20 m/s. Horizontal: 20×cos(30°)≈17.3 m/s. Vertical: 20×sin(30°)=10 m/s. Break the vector into parts!

examples.title: Force On Incline
examples.content: 10 N force on a 30° slope. Parallel to slope: 10×sin(30°)=5 N. Perpendicular: 10×cos(30°)≈8.7 N. Components show what matters.

examples.title: Reconstructing Vector
examples.content: Components: (3,4). Magnitude = √(3²+4²)=5. Angle = arctan(4/3)≈53°. Go from components back to the vector.
